arts.ttl: Max Eberl confirms Manuel Neuer rumors, talks contract situations at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Rumors have been swirling for days regarding Bayern Munich and Manuel Neuer being close to an agreement on a contract extension. Neuer is not the only Bayern Munich player whose contract status is up in the air.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer will get a contract extension at Bayern Munich only if his wellbeing permits it
arts.sum: Despite this, Bayern Munich still want to extend the 38-year-old’s contract as he is a key figure within the team. When it comes to extending Manuel Neuer’s contract, it’s all about health and fitness.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 23: Is Florian Wirtz really going to spurn Bayern Munich?; Should Bayern go after Xavi Simons?; How are we feeling about Manuel Neuer?; Man City wants Joshua Kimmich, Jamal Musiala; and MORE!
arts.sum: So much to talk about with Bayern Munich these days... Bayern Munich is making a lot of noise on and off the pitch these days, so let’s try and cover it all right here.

arts.ttl: Familiar faces: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl can look down on the pitch vs. RB Leipzig and see two teams he helped build
arts.sum: Max Eberl left RB Leipzig in favor of Bayern Munich... One player who Eberl will have an eye on for obvious reasons is Xavi Simons, who is expected to return from an injury to face the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig preview: Kompany looking for a response
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany challenge his side to bounce back from their recent defeat to Mainz when they welcome RB Leipzig to the Allianz Arena for Friday’s Bundesliga contest.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala: "I think I've gone up a level"
arts.sum: Ahead of the final game of the year against RB Leipzig, the Bayern Munich and Germany star talks to bundesliga.com about his development and his aims for the remainder of the campaign... Jamal Musiala has enjoyed a fantastic start to the season under Vincent Kompany, registering eight goals and one assist in the Bundesliga alone.

arts.ttl: “I would like to shape an era at FC Bayern” — Jamal Musiala wants to follow in the footsteps of legends at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Asked if it were a goal of his to follow in the footsteps of the aforementioned legends and shape an era of his own, current Bayern star Jamal Musiala left no room for misinterpretation: “I would like to shape an era at FC Bayern,” he boldly claimed, via @iMiaSanMia, before tracking back a little. I would like to work for that at FC Bayern.”

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: No other team has produced more clean sheets or conceded fewer goals than the two squads this season. On Friday night, Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig will duke it out in a battle of the two best defenses in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Kompany on Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sane: “My role is to judge players on their performances,” not their contracts
arts.sum: But sound logic won’t be enough to stop journalists from asking these kinds of questions... It is the nature of journalists that they try to elicit the most controversial quote they can get, so head coach Vincent Kompany always faces and sidesteps some questions that try to be sly and miserably fail.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany hopeful Harry Kane could feature in Bayern’s final game of year
arts.sum: The England captain had been expected to be sidelined until 2025 with a thigh injury.
